action.reasoning: Observation: the 4-epoch ViT-B/16 AugReg checkpoint improved Quickdraw accuracy from 0.1798 to 0.1836, our new best, with no evidence yet of overfitting on target. Analysis: this exact recipe is working, and the gain from 2→4 epochs suggests a moderate extension may still help. We have ~3.5 hours and 13 iterations left, enough for one more carefully bounded ViT run plus eval. The safest high-value move is to continue scaling the same backbone/recipe to 6 epochs total, while fixing validate.py plumbing so we can inspect local val cleanly. Decision: patch validate.py to accept backbone metadata/arg, run a 6-epoch ViT training into a new directory, validate locally with flip TTA, and if training completes submit next iteration based on results.
action.command: python train.py --data_dir /data --backbone vit_b16_augreg --epochs 6 --batch_size 96 --num_workers 12 --lr 3e-4 --weight_decay 0.05 --output_dir checkpoints/vit_6ep && python validate.py --data_dir /data --checkpoint checkpoints/vit_6ep/best.pt --tta_mode flip --batch_size 128 --num_workers 8
